abort.not_irobot_device: Discovered device is not an iRobot device
abort.robot_not_in_cloud: This robot was not found in your iRobot cloud account. The BLID does not match any robot.

error.cloud_auth_failed: Failed to authenticate with iRobot cloud. Check your email and password.
error.no_robots_found: No robots found in your iRobot cloud account.

user.description: How would you like to set up your Roomba or Braava?
user.title: iRobot Roomba

link_or_cloud.description: Your device {name} was found. How would you like to retrieve the password?
link_or_cloud.title: Choose authentication method

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Roomba or Braava.

manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Roomba or Braava.
manual.title: Manually connect to the device

link.description: Make sure that the iRobot app is not running on any device. Press and hold the Home button (or both Home and Spot buttons) on {name} until the device generates a sound (about two seconds), then submit within 30 seconds.
link.title: Retrieve password

link_manual.description: The password could not be retrieved from the device automatically. Please make sure that the iRobot app is not open on any device while trying to retrieve the password. Please follow the steps outlined in the documentation at: {auth_help_url}
link_manual.title: Enter password

cloud_login.description: Enter your iRobot account credentials. Your robot password will be retrieved automatically from the cloud.
cloud_login.title: Login with iRobot Cloud

cloud_robots.description: Select the robot you want to add.
cloud_robots.title: Select robot

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Roomba or Braava.

cloud_host.description: Enter the IP address of your robot for local control.
cloud_host.title: Enter robot IP address

clean_rooms.name: Clean specific rooms
clean_rooms.description: Send the Roomba to clean specific rooms.

rooms.name: Rooms
rooms.description: Room names to clean (must match names from your iRobot map, visible in the vacuum entity's rooms attribute).
